{{Short description|none}}
{{About|the men's team|the women's team|Saint Lucia women's national football team}}
{{Use British English|date=October 2025}}
{{Use dmy dates|date=October 2025}}
{{Infobox National football team
| Name                = Saint Lucia
| Badge               = 
| Badge_size          = 185px
| Nickname            = 
| Association         = [[Saint Lucia Football Association]] (SLFA)
| Confederation       = [[CONCACAF]] (North America)
| Sub-confederation   = [[Caribbean Football Union|CFU]] (Caribbean)
| Coach               = [[Stern John]]
| Captain             = [[Kurt Frederick (footballer)|Kurt Frederick]]
| Most caps           = [[Kurt Frederick (footballer)|Kurt Frederick]] (61)
| Top scorer          = [[Earl Jean]] (20)
| Home Stadium        = [[George Odlum Stadium]]
| FIFA Trigramme      = LCA
| FIFA Rank           = {{FIFA World Rankings|LCA}}
| FIFA max            = 108
| FIFA max date       = April 2003
| FIFA min            = 192
| FIFA min date       = March 2010
| Elo Rank            = {{World Football Elo Ratings|Saint Lucia}}
| Elo max             = 133
| Elo max date        = 28 March 2003
| Elo min             = 189
| Elo min date        = 11 November 2011
| pattern_la1         = 
| pattern_b1          = _SLU_h22
| pattern_ra1         = 
| pattern_sh1         = 
| pattern_so1         = 
| leftarm1            = 0000FF
| body1               = 0000FF
| rightarm1           = 0000FF
| shorts1             = 0000FF
| socks1              = 0000FF
| pattern_la2         = 
| pattern_b2          = _SLU_a22
| pattern_ra2         = 
| pattern_sh2         = 
| pattern_so2         = 
| leftarm2            = FFE600
| body2               = FFE600
| rightarm2           = FFE600
| shorts2             = FFE600
| socks2              = FFE600
| First game          = {{fb|DMA|1955}} 4–1 {{fb-rt|LCA|1875}} <br> ([[Dominica]]; 9 January 1938)
| Largest win         = {{fb|LCA|1979}} 14–1 {{fb-rt|VIR}} <br> ([[Port-au-Prince]], Haiti; 14 April 2001)
| Largest loss        = {{nowrap|{{fb|VIN}} 8–0 {{fb-rt|LCA}}}} <br> ([[Kingston, Jamaica|Kingston]], Jamaica; 1 October 2006)
| World cup apps      = 
| World cup first     = 
| World cup best      = 
| Regional name       = 
| Regional cup apps   = 
| Regional cup first  = 
| Regional cup best   = 
| medaltemplates      = 
{{MedalCompetition|[[Caribbean Cup]]}}
{{MedalBronze|[[1991 Caribbean Cup|1991 Jamaica]]|Team}}
}}

The '''Saint Lucia national football team''', recognized as '''St Lucia''' by [[FIFA]],<ref>{{cite web | url=https://inside.fifa.com/fifa-world-ranking/LCA?gender=men | title=Inside FIFA }}</ref> represents [[Saint Lucia]] in men's international [[Association football|football]] and is administered by the [[Saint Lucia Football Association]], the governing body for [[football in Saint Lucia]]. They have been a member of FIFA since 1988 and a member of [[CONCACAF]] since 1986. The team has never qualified for the [[FIFA World Cup]] or the [[CONCACAF Gold Cup]].

==History==
The team attempted to qualify to the [[FIFA World Cup|World Cup finals tournament]] for the first time during the [[1994 FIFA World Cup qualification|1994 World Cup qualification]], when they were eliminated in the first qualification round by [[Saint Vincent and the Grenadines national football team|Saint Vincent and the Grenadines]] in 1992.

In the [[2014 FIFA World Cup qualification (CONCACAF)|CONCACAF 2014 FIFA World Cup qualification]] Saint Lucia played [[Aruba national football team|Aruba]] in the first qualifying round&nbsp;– losing the first leg 4–2 in Aruba. The return leg in Saint Lucia ended in a 4–2 victory after 90 minutes, sending the tie into extra time, and then to penalty kicks.  Saint Lucia won the shoot-out 5–4 and advanced to the main draw for the 2014 FIFA World Cup.  Saint Lucia were then grouped with [[Canada men's national soccer team|Canada]], [[Saint Kitts and Nevis national football team|Saint Kitts and Nevis]], and [[Puerto Rico national football team|Puerto Rico]] in [[2014 FIFA World Cup qualification – CONCACAF second round#Group D|Group D]] of the second qualifying round. Saint Lucia were eliminated from World Cup qualification after finishing last in their group with one point as a result of one draw and five losses. 
In 2014 the team won the Windward Islands Tournament after beating Dominica 2–0, Grenada 1–0 and a tie with Saint Vincent & The Grenadines.

The Saint Lucia FA established a partnership with England's [[Carlisle United F.C.|Carlisle United]] which saw four Saint Lucians trial at the club each year from 2012 in exchange for Carlisle getting [[right of first refusal]] for the players' professional rights.<ref name="Two Saint Lucian Internationals for Carlisle">{{cite web|last=Finisterre|first=Terry|title=Two Saint Lucian Internationals for Carlisle|url=https://terryfinisterre.blogspot.com/2012/04/two-saint-lucian-internationals-for.html|publisher=Saint Lucia Sports|access-date=26 April 2013|archive-date=12 October 2016|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20161012142932/http://terryfinisterre.blogspot.com/2012/04/two-saint-lucian-internationals-for.html|url-status=live}}</ref>

FIFA announced that Saint Lucia withdrew from the [[2022 FIFA World Cup qualification (CONCACAF)|2022 FIFA World Cup qualification]] before their first match, after they were initially drawn into Group E in the [[2022 FIFA World Cup qualification – CONCACAF first round|first round]].<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.sportsmax.tv/index.php/football/regional/item/79613-st-lucia-players-in-the-dark-about-world-cup-qualifiers|title=St Lucia players in the dark about World Cup qualifiers|work=SportsMax|date=23 March 2021|access-date=20 June 2021|archive-date=3 June 2021|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20210603080821/https://www.sportsmax.tv/index.php/football/regional/item/79613-st-lucia-players-in-the-dark-about-world-cup-qualifiers|url-status=live}}</ref>

==Results and fixtures==
{{Main|Saint Lucia national football team results}}
The following is a list of match results in the last 12 months, as well as any future matches that have been scheduled.

{{legend2|#CCFFCC|Win|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}
{{legend2|#FFFFCC|Draw|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}
{{legend2|#FFCCCC|Loss|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}
{{legend2|#FFFFFF|Fixture|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}

===2025===
{{Football box collapsible
| format     = 1
|round      = [[2026 FIFA World Cup qualification – CONCACAF second round#Group C|2026 FIFA World Cup qualification]]
|date       = 6 June
|time       = {{UTZ|19:30|-4}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|CUW}}
|score      = 4–0
|team2      = {{fb|LCA}}
|goals1     = 
*[[Gervane Kastaneer|Kastaneer]] {{goal|37||52||57}}
*[[Juninho Bacuna|Bacuna]] {{goal|74}}
|goals2     =
|location   = [[Willemstad]], Curaçao
|stadium    = [[Ergilio Hato Stadium]]
|attendance =
|referee    = José Raúl Torres Rivera ([[Puerto Rico]])
|result     = L
|report     = https://www.fifa.com/fifaplus/en/match-centre/match/520/288301/288302/400017751
}}
{{Football box collapsible
| format     = 1
|round      = [[2026 FIFA World Cup qualification – CONCACAF second round#Group C|2026 FIFA World Cup qualification]]
|date       = 10 June
|time       = {{UTZ|18:00|-4}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|LCA}}
|score      = 2–1
|team2      = {{fb|BRB}}
|goals1     = 
*[[Caniggia Elva|Elva]] {{goal|42|pen.|90|pen.}}
|goals2     = 
*[[Devonte Richards|Richards]] {{goal|12}}
|location   = [[Gros Islet]], Saint Lucia
|stadium    = [[Daren Sammy Cricket Ground]]
|attendance = 144
|referee    = Sergio Reyna ([[National Football Federation of Guatemala|Guatemala]])
|result     = W
|report     = https://www.fifa.com/en/match-centre/match/520/288301/288302/400017749
}}
{{footballbox collapsible
| format     = 1
|round      = [[2025–26 CONCACAF Series]]
|date       = 12 November
|time       = {{UTZ|17:00|-4}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|CUB}}
|score      = 3–0
|team2      = {{fb|LCA}}
|report     = https://www.vavel.com/en-us/soccer/2025/11/12/1241039-cuba-vs-saint-lucia-live-score-friendly.html
|goals1     =
*[[Romario Torres|Torres]] {{goal|38}}
*[[Yasniel Matos|Matos]] {{goal|45+1}}
*[[Dairon Reyes|Reyes]] {{goal|53}}
|goals2     = 
|stadium    = [[Estadio Cibao FC]]
|location   = [[Santiago de los Caballeros|Santiago]], Dominican Republic
|attendance =
|referee    =
|result     = L
}}
{{Football box collapsible
|format     = 1
|round      = [[2025–26 CONCACAF Series]]
|date       = 15 November
|time       = {{UTZ|20:00|-4}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|VIN}}
|score      = 3–1
|team2      = {{fb|LCA}}
|report     = 
|goals1     =
*[[Oalex Anderson|Anderson]] {{goal|12}}
*[[Diel Spring|Spring]] {{goal|13}}
*[[Azinho Solomon|Solomon]] {{goal|62}}
|goals2     =
*[[Caniggia Elva|Elva]] {{goal|45}}
|location   = [[Santiago de los caballeros|Santiago]], Dominican Republic 
|stadium    = [[Estadio Cibao FC]]
|attendance = 
|referee    = 
|result     = L
}}

===2026===
{{Football box collapsible|format=1
|round      = [[2026 FIFA Series (men's matches)|2026 FIFA Series]]
|date       = 27 March 2026
|time       = {{UTZ|19:10|+4}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|AZE}}
|score      = 6–1
|team2      = {{fb|LCA}}
|report     = https://www.fifa.com/en/match-centre/match/10017/292840/292841/400021931?date=2026-03-27
|goals1     =
*[[Emin Mahmudov|Mahmudov]] {{goal|2|pen.}}
*[[Rəhim Sadıxov|Sadıxov]] {{goal|21}}
*[[Musa Qurbanlı|Qurbanlı]] {{goal|37}}
*[[Toral Bayramov|T. Bayramov]] {{goal|64}}
*[[Vusal Isgandarli|Isgandarli]] {{goal|86}}
*[[Rustam Akhmedzade|R. Akhmedzade]] {{goal|89}}
|goals2     =
*[[Donavan Phillip|Phillip]] {{goal|52|pen.}}
|location   = [[Sumgayit]], Azerbaijan
|stadium    = [[Sumgayit City Stadium]]
|attendance =
|referee    = Giorgi Kruashvili ([[Georgian Football Federation|Georgia]])
|result     = L
}}

==Coaching history==
{{div col|colwidth=22em}}
*{{flagicon|LCA|1979}} [[Kingsley Armstrong]] (1996)
*{{flagicon|LCA|1979}} [[Cassim Louis]] (1999–00)
*{{flagicon|LCA}} [[Kingsley Armstrong]] (2002–04)
*{{flagicon|LCA}} [[Carson Millar]] (2004–06)
*{{flagicon|LCA}} [[Terrence Caroo]] (2006–10)
*{{flagicon|LCA}} [[Alain Providence]] (2010–11)
*{{flagicon|LCA}} [[Francis Lastic]] (2012–2018){{Citation needed|date=August 2022}}
*{{flagicon|St. Lucia}} [[Francis McDonald (football)|Francis McDonald]] (2018–2019)
*{{flagicon|Trinidad and Tobago}} [[Jamaal Shabazz]] (2019–2021)
*{{flagicon|Trinidad and Tobago}} [[Stern John]] (2022–present)
{{div col end}}

==Players==

===Current squad===
The following players were called up for the [[2026 FIFA Series (men's matches)#Azerbaijan|2026 FIFA Series]] match against [[Azerbaijan national football team|Azerbaijan]] on 27 March 2026.<ref>{{cite web |title=Full Squad |url=https://www.facebook.com/SLFAinc/posts/fifa-recently-confirmed-the-full-line-up-of-hosts-and-the-composition-of-the-gro/1409165034586894/|website=Facebook |publisher=}}</ref>

''Caps and goals correct as of 15 November 2025, after the match against [[Saint Vincent and the Grenadines national football team|Saint Vincent and the Grenadines]].''

{{nat fs g start}}
{{nat fs g player|no=1|pos=GK|name=[[Devone St. Prix]]|age={{bda|1997|9|1|df=y}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[La Clery]]|clubnat=LCA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=2|pos=GK|name=[[Darren Donaie]]|age={{bda|2003|5|5|df=y}}|caps=1|goals=0|club=[[Molynes United F.C.|Molynes United]]|clubnat=JAM}}
{{nat fs g player|no=3|pos=GK|name=[[A'dee Germe]]|age={{bda|2008|1|28|df=y}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Uptown Rebels]]|clubnat=LCA}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs g player|no=4|pos=DF|name=[[Ajani Louis]]|age=|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Choiseul (football club)|Choiseul]]|clubnat=LCA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=5|pos=DF|name=[[Melvin Doxilly]]|age={{bda|df=y|1998|1|2}}|caps=42|goals=0|club=[[Mount Pleasant Football Academy|Mount Pleasant]]|clubnat=JAM}}
{{nat fs g player|no=6|pos=DF|name=[[Alvinus Myers]]|age={{bda|df=y|1996|6|3}}|caps=41|goals=0|club=[[Spanish Town Police]]|clubnat=JAM}}
{{nat fs g player|no=7|pos=DF|name=[[Doneal Lionel]]|age={{bda|1998|7|30|df=y}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[La Clery]]|clubnat=LCA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=8|pos=DF|name=[[Ridel Stanislas]]|age={{bda|1997|9|7|df=y}}|caps=25|goals=3|club=[[Grenades F.C.|Grenades]]|clubnat=ATG}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs g player|no=9|pos=MF|name=[[Shaquan Nelson]]|age={{bda|df=y|2004|5|11}}|caps=9|goals=0|club=[[Villena CF]]|clubnat=ESP}}
{{nat fs g player|no=10|pos=MF|name=[[Thierry Morille]]|age={{bda|df=y|2008|8|30}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Northern United]]|clubnat=LCA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=11|pos=MF|name=[[Lester Joseph]]|age={{bda|df=y|1993|2|23}}|caps=41|goals=1|club=[[Grenades F.C.|Grenades]]|clubnat=ATG}}
{{nat fs g player|no=12|pos=MF|name=[[Trent Alexander (footballer)|Trent Alexander]]|age={{bda|2001|8|16|df=y}}|caps=3|goals=0|club=[[Square United Vieux Fort]]|clubnat=LCA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=13|pos=MF|name=[[Bayan Aman]]|age={{bda|df=y|2005|7|1}}|caps=6|goals=0|club=[[FK Velež Nevesinje|Velež Nevesinje]]|clubnat=BIH}}
{{nat fs g player|no=14|pos=MF|name=[[Mervin St. Romain]]|age={{bda|2005|12|26|df=y}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[La Clery]]|clubnat=LCA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=15|pos=MF|name=[[Eymani Butcher]]|age={{bda|2007|12|25|df=y}}|caps=3|goals=0|club=[[Black Panthers SC|Black Panthers]]|clubnat=LCA}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs g player|no=16|pos=FW|name=[[Donavan Phillip]]|age={{bda|2005|1|4|df=y}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Colorado Rapids]]|clubnat=USA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=17|pos=FW|name=[[Hemaiael Charlery]]|age={{bda|2004|10|5|df=y}}|caps=4|goals=0|club=[[Roseau Valley]]|clubnat=LCA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=18|pos=FW|name=[[Shevon Byron]]|age={{bda|2008|4|27|df=y}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Mount Pleasant Football Academy|Mount Pleasant Academy]]|clubnat=JAM}}
{{nat fs g player|no=19|pos=FW|name=[[Arkell Jude-Boyd]]|age={{bda|df=y|2003|1|22}}|caps=6|goals=1|club=[[ShrewsburyTown.|Shrewsbury Town]]|clubnat=ENG}}
{{nat fs g player|no=20|pos=FW|name=[[Kegan Caull]]|age={{bda|2004|3|20|df=y}}|caps=4|goals=0|club=[[Basildon United F.C.|Basildon United]]|clubnat=ENG}}
{{nat fs g player|no=21|pos=FW|name=[[Jahlil Evans]]|age={{bda|2004|9|3|df=y}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Cimpex]]|clubnat=LCA}}
{{nat fs g end}}

===Recent call-ups===
The following players have also been called up to the Saint Lucia squad within the last twelve months.

{{nat fs r start}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Vino Barclett]]|age={{bda|1999|10|12|df=y}}|caps=39|goals=0|club=[[Cavalier F.C.|Cavalier]]|clubnat=JAM|latest=v. {{fb|SVG}}; 15 November 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Lamar Johnson (footballer)|Lamar Joseph-Johnson]]|age={{bda|1991|11|4|df=y}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[Welwyn Garden City F.C.|Welwyn Garden City]]|clubnat=ENG|latest=v. {{fb|SVG}}; 15 November 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Anton Richard]]|age={{bda|1997|11|7|df=y}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[White House Dennery]]|clubnat=LCA|latest=v. {{fb|SVG}}; 15 November 2025}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Kurt Frederick (footballer)|Kurt Frederick]]|other=|age={{bda|df=y|1991|4|27}}|caps=69|goals=12|club=[[Morvant Caledonia United]]|clubnat=TTO|latest=v. {{fb|SVG}}; 15 November 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Josh Solomon-Davies]]|age={{bda|df=y|1999|11|20}}|caps=14|goals=0|club=[[Vauxhall Motors F.C.|Vauxhall Motors]]|clubnat=ENG|latest=v. {{fb|SVG}}; 15 November 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Malik Louis]]|age={{bda|df=y|2008|12|21}}|caps=1|goals=0|club=[[Northern United]]|clubnat=LCA|latest=v. {{fb|SVG}}; 15 November 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Terell Thomas]]|age={{bda|df=y|1995|10|18}}|caps=19|goals=1|club=[[Carlisle United F.C.|Carlisle United]]|clubnat=ENG|latest=v. {{fb|BRB}}; 10 June 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Arkell Jude-Boyd]]|age={{bda|df=y|2003|1|22}}|caps=6|goals=1|club=[[Shrewsbury Town F.C.|Shrewsbury Town]]|clubnat=ENG|latest=v. {{fb|BRB}}; 10 June 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Ryan Remi]]|age={{bda|df=y|2005|2|2}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=''Unknown''|clubnat=|latest=v. {{fb|BRB}}; 10 June 2025}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Gregson President]]|age={{bda|df=y|1996|1|30}}|caps=18|goals=3|club=[[Montego Bay United]]|clubnat=JAM|latest=v. {{fb|SVG}}; 15 November 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Brandon Sandiford]]|age={{bda|2003|9|20|df=y}}|caps=8|goals=0|club=[[Mabouya Valley]]|clubnat=LCA|latest=v. {{fb|SVG}}; 15 November 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Dervaj Edward]]|age={{bda|2008|9|27|df=y}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=''Unknown''|clubnat=|latest=v. {{fb|SVG}}; 15 November 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Elijah Joseph (footballer)|Elijah Joseph]]|age={{bda|2005|11|17|df=y}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[White House Dennery]]|clubnat=LCA|latest=v. {{fb|SVG}}; 15 November 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Leaus Henville]]|age={{bda|1996|12|7|df=y}}|caps=20|goals=0|club=[[Mabouya Valley]]|clubnat=LCA|latest=v. {{fb|BRB}}; 10 June 2025}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Aaron Richard]]|age={{bda|2005|7|14|df=y}}|caps=18|goals=1|club=[[Monchy United]]|clubnat=LCA|latest=v. {{fb|SVG}}; 15 November 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Caniggia Elva]]|age={{bda|1996|7|14|df=y}}|caps=16|goals=8|club=[[Cavalry FC]]|clubnat=CAN|latest=v. {{fb|SVG}}; 15 November 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Donavan Jn. Baptiste]]|age={{bda|1996|6|27|df=y}}|caps=14|goals=2|club=[[El Niño's FC|El Niño's]]|clubnat=LCA|latest=v. {{fb|SVG}}; 15 November 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Saviola Elva]]|age={{bda|2002|6|19|df=y}}|caps=3|goals=1|club=[[Platinum FC]]|clubnat=LCA|latest=v. {{fb|SVG}}; 15 November 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Troy Greenidge]]|age={{bda|df=y|1992|8|30}}|caps=5|goals=1|club=[[Northern United]]|clubnat=LCA|latest=v. {{fb|BRB}}; 10 June 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Ryan Charles]]|age={{bda|1995|8|5|df=y}}|caps=4|goals=1|club=[[Bishop's Stortford F.C.|Bishop's Stortford]]|clubnat=ENG|latest=v. {{fb|BRB}}; 10 June 2025}}
{{nat fs end}}

==Player records==
{{Updated|15 November 2025}}<ref>{{cite web |title=Saint Lucia |url=https://www.national-football-teams.com/country/155/Saint_Lucia.html |website=National Football Teams |access-date=9 August 2022 |archive-date=10 September 2023 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20230910155031/https://www.national-football-teams.com/country/155/2023/Saint_Lucia.html |url-status=live }}</ref>
:''Players in '''bold''' are still active with Saint Lucia.''

===Most appearances===

{| class="wikitable sortable" style="text-align:center;"
|-
!width=30px|Rank
! style="width:150px;"|Player
!width=50px|Caps
!width=50px|Goals
! style="width:100px;"|Career
|-
|1
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Kurt Frederick (footballer)|Kurt Frederick]]'''
|69
|12
|2010–present
|-
|2
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Melvin Doxilly]]'''
|42
|0
|2017–present
|-
|rowspan=2|3
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Lester Joseph]]'''
|41
|1
|2014–present
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Alvinus Myers]]'''
|41
|0
|2017–present
|-
|rowspan="2"|5
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Pernal Williams]]
|39
|3
|2010–2019
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Vino Barclett]]'''
|39
|0
|2017–present
|-
|7
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Sheldon Emmanuel]]
|34
|4
|2002–2015
|-
|rowspan=3|8
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Titus Elva]]
|27
|16
|1995–2008
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Tremain Paul]]
|27
|4
|2011–2019
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Malik St. Prix]]
|27
|2
|2014–2023
|-
|}

===Top goalscorers===

{| class="wikitable sortable" style="text-align:center;"
|-
!width=30px|Rank
! style="width:150px;"|Player
!width=50px|Goals
!width=50px|Caps
!width=50px|Ratio
! style="width:100px;"|Career
|-
|1
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Earl Jean]]
|20
|23
|{{#expr:20/23 round 2}}
|1990–2004
|-
|2
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Titus Elva]]
|16
|27
|{{#expr:16/27 round 2}}
|1995–2008
|-
|3
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Kurt Frederick (footballer)|Kurt Frederick]]'''
|12
|69
|{{#expr:12/69 round 2}}
|2010–present
|-
|rowspan=2|4
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Caniggia Elva]]'''
|8
|16
|{{#expr:8/16 round 2}}
|2023–present
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Emerson Sheldon Mark]]
|8
|22
|{{#expr:8/22 round 2}}
|1999–2008
|-
|rowspan=3|6
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Jean-Marie Emerson]]
|7
|7
|{{#expr:7/7 round 2}}
|1999–2002
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Elijah Joseph]]
|7
|22
|{{#expr:7/22 round 2}}
|1996–2012
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Cliff Valcin]]
|7
|23
|{{#expr:7/23 round 2}}
|2010–2014
|-
|rowspan=2|9
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Levi Gilbert]]
|6
|10
|{{#expr:6/10 round 2}}
|2004–2008
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Jamil Joseph]]
|6
|23
|{{#expr:6/23 round 2}}
|2010–2015
|-
|}

==Competitive record==

===FIFA World Cup===
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center;"
!colspan=9|[[FIFA World Cup]]
!rowspan=28|
!colspan=6|[[FIFA World Cup qualification|Qualification]]
|-
!Year
!Round
!Position
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}*
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
|-
|[[1930 FIFA World Cup|1930]] to [[1978 FIFA World Cup|1978]]
|colspan=8|''Part of {{flag|United Kingdom}}''
|colspan=6|''Part of {{flag|United Kingdom}}''
|-
|[[1982 FIFA World Cup|1982]] to [[1990 FIFA World Cup|1990]]
| colspan=8|''Not a FIFA member''
| colspan=6|''Not a FIFA member''
|-
| {{flagicon|United States}} [[1994 FIFA World Cup|1994]]
| colspan=8 rowspan=7|''Did not qualify''
| 2
| 1
| 0
| 1
| 2
| 3
|-
| {{flagicon|France|1974}} [[1998 FIFA World Cup|1998]]
| 2
| 0
| 0
| 2
| 1
| 6
|-
| {{flagicon|South Korea|1997}} {{flagicon|Japan}} [[2002 FIFA World Cup|2002]]
| 2
| 1
| 0
| 1
| 1
| 1
|-
| {{flagicon|Germany}} [[2006 FIFA World Cup|2006]]
| 4
| 2
| 0
| 2
| 10
| 7
|-
| {{flagicon|South Africa}} [[2010 FIFA World Cup|2010]]
| 4
| 1
| 0
| 3
| 4
| 11
|-
| {{flagicon|Brazil}} [[2014 FIFA World Cup|2014]]
| 8
| 1
| 1
| 6
| 10
| 29
|-
| {{flagicon|Russia}} [[2018 FIFA World Cup|2018]]
| 2
| 1
| 0	
| 1
| 4
| 5
|-
| {{flagicon|Qatar}} [[2022 FIFA World Cup|2022]]
| colspan=8|''Withdrew''
| colspan=6|''Withdrew''
|-
| {{flagicon|Canada}} {{flagicon|Mexico}} {{flagicon|United States}} [[2026 FIFA World Cup|2026]]
| colspan=8|''Did not qualify''
| 4
| 1
| 1	
| 2
| 5
| 9
|-
| {{flagicon|Morocco}} {{flagicon|Portugal}} {{flagicon|Spain}} [[2030 FIFA World Cup|2030]]
| colspan=8 rowspan=2|''To be determined''
| colspan=6 rowspan=2|''To be determined''
|-
| {{flagicon|Saudi Arabia}} [[2034 FIFA World Cup|2034]]
|-
!Total: {{Tooltip|0/9|Number of tournaments qualified for}}
! 
!
! 
! 
! 
! 
!
!
!28
!8
!2
!18
!37
!71
|}

===CONCACAF Gold Cup===
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center;"
|-
!colspan=10|[[CONCACAF Gold Cup]] record
|-
!Year
!Round
!Position
!Pld
!W
!D*
!L
!GF
!GA
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}} [[1991 CONCACAF Gold Cup|1991]]||colspan=8 rowspan=9|''Did not qualify''
|-
| {{flagicon|MEX}} {{flagicon|USA}} [[1993 CONCACAF Gold Cup|1993]]
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}} [[1996 CONCACAF Gold Cup|1996]]
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}} [[1998 CONCACAF Gold Cup|1998]]
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}} [[2000 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2000]]
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}} [[2002 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2002]]
|-
| {{flagicon|MEX}} {{flagicon|USA}} [[2003 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2003]]
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}} [[2005 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2005]]
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}} [[2007 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2007]]
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}} [[2009 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2009]]||colspan=8|''Did not enter''
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}} [[2011 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2011]]||colspan=8 rowspan=8|''Did not qualify''
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}} [[2013 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2013]]
|-
| {{flagicon|CAN}} {{flagicon|USA}} [[2015 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2015]]
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}} [[2017 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2017]]
|-
| {{flagicon|CRC}} {{flagicon|JAM}} {{flagicon|USA}} [[2019 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2019]]
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}} [[2021 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2021]]
|-
| {{flagicon|CAN}} {{flagicon|USA}} [[2023 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2023]]
|-
| {{flagicon|CAN}} {{flagicon|USA}} [[2025 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2025]]
|-
!Total:0/18|| || || || || || || ||
|}

===CONCACAF Nations League===
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center;"
|-
! colspan="20" |[[CONCACAF Nations League]] record
|-
! colspan="10" |League
! rowspan="7" |
! colspan="9" |Finals
|-
!Season
!Division
!Group
! width="28" |{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
! width="28" |{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
! width="28" |{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}
! width="28" |{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
! width="28" |{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
! width="28" |{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
! width="28" |{{Tooltip|P/R|Promotion/relegation at end of season}}
!'''Finals'''
!'''Result'''
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
!{{Tooltip|Squad|Finals Squad Only}}
|-
|[[2019–20 CONCACAF Nations League|2019–20]]
|[[2019–20 CONCACAF Nations League B|B]]
|[[2019–20 CONCACAF Nations League B#Group B|B]]
|6
|1
|1
|4
|2
|10
|{{fall}}
|{{flagicon|USA}} [[2021 CONCACAF Nations League Finals|2021]]
| colspan="8" rowspan="4" |''Ineligible''
|-
|[[2022–23 CONCACAF Nations League|2022–23]]
|[[2022–23 CONCACAF Nations League C|C]]
|[[2022–23 CONCACAF Nations League C#Group C|C]]
|4
|4
|0
|0
|8
|2
|{{rise}}
|{{flagicon|USA}} [[2023 CONCACAF Nations League Finals|2023]]
|-
|[[2023–24 CONCACAF Nations League|2023–24]]
|[[2023–24 CONCACAF Nations League B|B]]
|[[2023–24 CONCACAF Nations League B#Group A|A]]
|6
|3
|1
|2
|10
|6
|{{same position}}
|{{flagicon|USA}} [[2024 CONCACAF Nations League Finals|2024]]
|-
|[[2024–25 CONCACAF Nations League|2024–25]]
|[[2024–25 CONCACAF Nations League B|B]]
|[[2024–25 CONCACAF Nations League B#Group B|B]]
|6
|3
|0
|3
|7
|15
|{{same position}}
|{{flagicon|USA}} [[2025 CONCACAF Nations League Finals|2025]]
|-
!Total
!'''—'''
!'''—'''
!22
!11
!2
!9
!27
!33
!'''—'''
!'''Total'''
!'''0 Titles'''
!'''—'''
!'''—'''
!'''—'''
!'''—'''
!'''—'''
!'''—'''
!'''—'''
|}

===Caribbean Cup===
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center;"
!colspan=9|[[Caribbean Cup]] record
|-
!Year
!Round
!Position
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}*
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
|-
|{{flagicon|BAR}} [[1989 Caribbean Cup|1989]]
|colspan=8 rowspan=2|''Did not qualify''
|-
|{{flagicon|TRI}} [[1990 Caribbean Cup|1990]]
|- style="background:#c96;"
|{{flagicon|JAM}} [[1991 Caribbean Cup|1991]]
|'''Third place'''
|'''3rd'''
|'''7'''
|'''4'''
|'''2'''
|'''1'''
|'''15'''
|'''4'''
|-
|{{flagicon|TRI}} [[1992 Caribbean Cup|1992]]
|colspan=8|''Did not qualify''
|-
|{{flagicon|JAM}} [[1993 Caribbean Cup|1993]]
|Group stage
|8th
|3
|0
|1
|2
|3
|7
|-
|{{flagicon|TRI}} [[1994 Caribbean Cup|1994]]
|colspan=8|''Did not enter''
|-
|{{flagicon|CAY}} {{flagicon|JAM}} [[1995 Caribbean Cup|1995]]
|Group stage
|8th
|3
|0
|0
|3
|1
|9
|-
|{{flagicon|TRI}} [[1996 Caribbean Cup|1996]]
|colspan=8 rowspan=7|''Did not qualify''
|-
|{{flagicon|ATG}} {{flagicon|SKN}} [[1997 Caribbean Cup|1997]]
|-
|{{flagicon|JAM}} {{flagicon|TRI}} [[1998 Caribbean Cup|1998]]
|-
|{{flagicon|TRI}} [[1999 Caribbean Cup|1999]]
|-
|{{flagicon|TRI}} [[2001 Caribbean Cup|2001]]
|-
|{{flagicon|BRB}} [[2005 Caribbean Cup|2005]]
|-
|{{flagicon|TRI}} [[2007 Caribbean Cup|2007]]
|-
|{{flagicon|JAM}} [[2008 Caribbean Cup|2008]]
|colspan=8|''Withdrew''
|-
|{{flagicon|MTQ|snake}} [[2010 Caribbean Cup|2010]]
|colspan=9 rowspan=3|''Did not qualify''
|-
|{{flagicon|ATG}} [[2012 Caribbean Cup|2012]]
|-
|{{flagicon|JAM}} [[2014 Caribbean Cup|2014]]
|-
|{{flagicon|MTQ|snake}} [[2017 Caribbean Cup|2017]]
|colspan=9|''Did not enter''
|-
!Total:3/19||Third place||3rd||13||4||3||6||19||20
|}

==Honors==
* '''[[Caribbean Cup]]'''
** {{bronze3}} Third place (1): [[1991 Caribbean Cup|1991]]

* '''[[FIFA Series]]'''
**{{bronze3}} Third Place (1): [[2026 FIFA Series (men's matches)#Azerbaijan|2026]]

==References==
{{Reflist}}

==External links==
* {{official website|http://stluciafa.org/}} of the [[Saint Lucia Football Association]]
* [http://www.concacaf.com/team/st-lucia Team profile] on CONCACAF.com

{{Saint Lucia national football team}}
{{Football in Saint Lucia}}
{{CONCACAF teams}}
{{National sports teams of Saint Lucia}}

[[Category:Saint Lucia national football team| ]]
[[Category:Caribbean national association football teams]]
[[Category:1994 establishments in Saint Lucia]]
